surfaces.header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/90 border-b border-gray-100 sticky top-0 z-50

components.buttons: bg-yellow-500 text-black hover:bg-yellow-400 font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-xl transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2
components.inputs: bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-yellow-500 focus:border-yellow-500 outline-none text-gray-900
components.badges: bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800 text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-md uppercase tracking-wide

hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract yellow geometric shadow background for marketing hero section

finance_earning.description: Person holding coin in front of computer, great for earning/cashback section
Person pointing at growth chart, ideal for dashboard or analytics

training.description: Two colleagues engaging in an online meeting, used for video training thumbnails

accessibility.contrast_strategy: Ensure text over golden accents is pure black (#0A0A0A) for readability. Use dark charcoal (#111827) for main body text.
accessibility.focus_rings: Visible focus rings (yellow-500) around interactive elements.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must include data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load 'Outfit' font for headings and 'Manrope' for body text via Google Fonts in index.html.
Apply 'font-sans' to body. Configure Tailwind theme.fontFamily to use Outfit for 'heading' and Manrope for 'sans'.
Use pure white cards with a very light gray border (border-gray-200) and rounded-xl corners over a slightly off-white (bg-gray-50) background to make cards pop naturally without heavy shadows.
Implement a sticky glassmorphism header. Ensure there is a 'Join WhatsApp Group' button for paid users that redirects appropriately.
For the E-commerce and Cashback product grids, use CSS grid with generous spacing (gap-6 or gap-8) and keep image heights consistent via aspect-ratio utilities.
The admin dashboard should use a dense 'Control Room' grid layout.
DO NOT use generic template designs; embed character into the UI with uppercase tracking-wide labels for small meta-info and fluid typography for large numbers/balances.
Use the provided logo exclusively. If an icon is needed for a brand element, use lucide-react.
Follow standard HTML+Tailwind for generic layouts, use Shadcn for complex interactives (dialogs, tabs, dropdowns).
